ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., Endangered, Vulnerable) */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat where the species is typically found */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Information about the species' diet */,
  "reproductive_rate" TEXT /* Reproductive rate of the species (e.g., fast, slow) */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "last_observed" TEXT /* Date of the last recorded observation of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the site's location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., forest, wetland) */,
  "last_surveyed" TEXT /* Date of the last survey at the site */,
  "survey_interval" INTEGER /* Frequency of surveys at the site in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species observed */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the observation was made */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the observation */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the observation */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the observation */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the observed species */,
  "trend" INTEGER /* Trend indicator (e.g., 1 for increase, 0 for stable, -1 for decrease) */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the observation */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "observation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the observation (e.g., visual, camera trap) */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the observation (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, field staff, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions granted to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, create, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the trend (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report content */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's key findings */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or roles the report was shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for addressing the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new data, report generated) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
